assessment.summary_for_seller: Good run: you held context, answered on-point, and brought the conversation to a next step.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote:
Subject: Docklane: Champion теряет время на firefighting вместо команды и delivery.

Hi Mark Levin,

Concrete boundary from line one: Mellow handles contractor documents, KYC, payment chain operations, and audit trail; legal qualification and strategic risk decisions remain on your side.

Would it make sense to compare this against your current flow?

Best,
Pavel

objections.objection:
Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Tired of being the middleman between finance and contractors. If this really removes manual escalations — what specifically gets removed and how much?

Best,
Марк

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Too early. You haven't convinced me yet this isn't just another vendor.

Best,
Марк

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Ok. Send me something I can bring to finance without a long internal pitch.

Best,
Марк

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. I've heard 'upgrade your ops' before. What concretely stops happening manually?

Best,
Марк

transcript.text:
Subject: Docklane: Champion теряет время на firefighting вместо команды и delivery.

Hi Mark Levin,

Concrete boundary from line one: Mellow handles contractor documents, KYC, payment chain operations, and audit trail; legal qualification and strategic risk decisions remain on your side.

Would it make sense to compare this against your current flow?

Best,
Pavel

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Tired of being the middleman between finance and contractors. If this really removes manual escalations — what specifically gets removed and how much?

Best,
Марк

Hi Mark Levin,

Ops impact with boundaries: manual payment follow-ups and reconciliation are replaced by Mellow-owned flow plus audit trail, while your team still owns legal qualification decisions.

Would it make sense to compare this against your current flow?

Best,
Pavel

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Too early. You haven't convinced me yet this isn't just another vendor.

Best,
Марк

Hi Mark Levin,

Ops impact with boundaries: manual payment follow-ups and reconciliation are replaced by Mellow-owned flow plus audit trail, while your team still owns legal qualification decisions.

Would it make sense to compare this against your current flow?

Best,
Pavel

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Ok. Send me something I can bring to finance without a long internal pitch.

Best,
Марк

Hi Mark Levin,

Concretely for ops: less manual status chasing, less reconciliation overhead, and a named owner for incidents. That is the before/after change, not a generic platform claim.

Would it make sense to compare this against your current flow?

Best,
Pavel

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. I've heard 'upgrade your ops' before. What concretely stops happening manually?

Best,
Марк

Hi Mark Levin,

Ops impact with boundaries: manual payment follow-ups and reconciliation are replaced by Mellow-owned flow plus audit trail, while your team still owns legal qualification decisions.

Would it make sense to compare this against your current flow?

Best,
Pavel

Sdr_agent,

Thanks for reaching out. Agreed. Waiting for your email.

Best,
Марк
